articles.title: Defense in Orbit: Germany Goes Big in the Military Space Race
articles.summary: Berlin was long content to ignore space as a military frontier. But now, the Merz government is investing 35 billion euros in an array of new systems. The race for lucrative contracts has begun.

articles.title: Trump's Blockade: The Lights Are Going Out in Cuba
articles.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump is forcing Cuba to its knees. Power outages are the norm and people are having trouble making ends meet. Many say, though, that the problems are homemade.
